name: KrillApp.Server.Peer
title: Server Peer
description: Represents a connection from the local Krill server to another Krill server in the mesh network. Enables distributed deployments where servers share data and coordinate automation. Servers communicate over HTTPS using API key-based bearer token authentication.
shortDescription: Represents a peer-to-peer connection between two Krill servers in the mesh network.
llmPurpose: Represents a peer connection to another Krill server in the mesh network, enabling server-to-server communication and data sharing.
llmBehavior: represents a remote server in the mesh network
communicates over HTTPS with API key authentication
enables cross-server data and automation coordination
llmInputs: remote server hostname, port, API key
llmTypicalUseCases: share data between Raspberry Pi nodes
llmCreationHints: Create a Peer node when the user wants to connect two Krill servers for cross-server data sharing or automation. Requires the remote server's hostname, port, and API key.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf structural node representing a remote server connection

llmExamples: Connect this server to the one in the garage.
Link these two Raspberry Pi servers together.
